top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.url
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2008 
  AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND res.position = '1';

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.url
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2008 
  AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND res.position = '1';

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.url
FROM races r
JOIN driverStandings ds ON r.raceId = ds.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON ds.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2008 
  AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND ds.position = '1';

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.url
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2008 
  AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND res.position = '1';

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.url
FROM races r
JOIN driverStandings ds ON r.raceId = ds.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON ds.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2008 
  AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND ds.position = '1';

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.url
FROM races r
JOIN driverStandings ds ON r.raceId = ds.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON ds.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2008 
  AND r.name LIKE '%Australian Grand Prix%' 
  AND ds.positionText = '1';

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.url
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.year = 2008 
  AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND res.position = '1';
